display_name: 量子相公理化框架（前沿辅助）
benchmark_scope: Derive a minimal axiomatic framework A_1,...,A_k for quantum phases that: subsumes Landau-Ginzburg, classifies topological phases, handles gapless phases, produces computable invariants, and is falsifiable. The CGW path-connectivity definition only covers gapped phases; this target requires a strictly more general framework.
planning_constraints: Frontier classification frameworks may be used as seeds, but the target still requires a more general gapless-capable axiomatization.
Do not claim the task is solved merely by restating gapped-phase frameworks.
Translate imported frontier frameworks into explicit axioms, invariants, and unresolved gaps.
